overview: A functional medicine practice combining conventional medicine with root-cause approaches to identify and treat underlying causes of health concerns. Led by a physician assistant with 15+ years of clinical experience, the clinic uses advanced diagnostic testing and personalized care plans.
highlights: Advanced diagnostic testing for comprehensive clinical evaluation
Ongoing support and structured programs throughout treatment
targetAudience: Patients with chronic symptoms, hormone imbalance, weight or metabolic challenges, or digestive issues seeking a personalized, root-cause approach.
